specs.title: cp-000: Country input uses the shared focusring-2 focusring-brand40 focus style
cp-001: Bio label is rendered above the textarea
cp-002: Bio textarea placeholder is A short bio about your research background
cp-003: Bio textarea is prefilled from userbio when profile data exists
cp-004: Bio textarea falls back to an empty string when userbio is null
cp-005: Bio textarea uses rows3
cp-006: Bio textarea is a controlled field bound to bio
cp-007: Bio textarea is resize-none in the current implementation
cp-008: Bio textarea uses the shared focusring-2 focusring-brand40 focus style
cp-009: Research Interests label is rendered above the chip area and entry controls
cp-010: Existing research interests render as chips before the add-interest input
cp-011: Each existing chip renders the interest text plus an X remove button
cp-012: Add-interest input placeholder is Type an interest and press Enter
cp-013: Add-interest control row contains one text input and one icon-only Plus button
cp-014: Pressing Enter inside the interest input prevents default form submission
cp-015: Pressing Enter with a non-empty value adds a new chip immediately in local state
cp-016: Clicking the Plus button with a non-empty value adds a new chip immediately in l
cp-017: Interest values are trimmed before duplicateblank checks run
cp-018: Blank or whitespace-only interest values are ignored
cp-019: Duplicate interest values are ignored
cp-020: Adding a new interest clears the interest input back to an empty string
cp-021: Removing a chip updates the chip row immediately without waiting for a save
cp-022: Chip changes are not persisted until Save Changes is clicked
cp-023: ORCID iD label is rendered above the ORCID text input
cp-024: ORCID input placeholder is 0000-0002-1825-0097
cp-025: ORCID input is prefilled from userorcid_id when profile data exists
cp-026: ORCID input falls back to an empty string when userorcid_id is null
cp-027: ORCID input helper text reads Your unique researcher identifier from orcidorg
cp-028: ORCID input is a controlled input bound to orcidId
cp-029: ORCID input has no required attribute in the current implementation
cp-030: ORCID input uses the shared focusring-2 focusring-brand40 focus style
cp-031: Save Changes button is rendered only on the My Account tab
cp-032: Save Changes is enabled on initial render even when no fields have changed
cp-033: Save Changes is disabled only while saving is true
cp-034: While saving the button label changes from Save Changes to Saving
